summary: AgentForge AI Software Factory - Testing extracted routes after server.py refactoring. All 15 backend tests passed (100% success rate). Routes successfully extracted from server.py to modular files (settings.py, god_mode_v1.py, god_mode_v2.py, quick_actions.py, agent_memory.py, build_operations.py, build_memory.py).
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/settings - Returns user settings (defaultEngine, theme, autoSaveFiles, streamingMode)
✅ GET /api/local-bridge/download - Returns ZIP file (200) with application/zip content-type
✅ GET /api/god-mode/status/{project_id} - Returns build status (project_id, god_mode_complete, god_mode_phase, files_saved, file_paths)
✅ GET /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} - Returns V2 build status (build_id, status, iterations_completed, total_files)
✅ GET /api/god-mode-v2/status/{non-existent} - Returns not_found for non-existent build_id
✅ GET /api/war-room/{project_id}?limit=1 - Returns war room messages array
✅ GET /api/memory/stats - Returns memory statistics (total_builds, successful_builds, success_rate, total_insights, by_project_type)
critical_code_review_comments: All extracted routes work correctly after refactoring
god_mode_v1.py - /api/god-mode/status/{project_id} returns correct build status structure
god_mode_v2.py - /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} returns proper status (not_started, complete, not_found)
quick_actions.py - /api/quick-actions returns 6 quick actions, /api/custom-actions returns empty list initially
build_operations.py - /api/systems/open-world returns 15 systems, /api/war-room and /api/demos work correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test project ID 334166ac-9ea3-45d8-b4d2-3c81e7ef19c1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py refactoring from 8578 to 7373 lines complete. All extracted routes verified working. Routes tested: settings.py (settings + local-bridge), god_mode_v1.py (V1 status), god_mode_v2.py (V2 status), quick_actions.py (quick-actions + custom-actions), agent_memory.py (memory), build_operations.py (open-world systems, war-room, blueprints, demos), build_memory.py (memory stats). All 15 endpoints return correct HTTP status codes and expected data structures.

settings_routes.GET /api/settings: Returns user settings with defaultEngine, theme, autoSaveFiles, streamingMode
settings_routes.GET /api/local-bridge/download: Returns ZIP file (200) with application/zip content-type

god_mode_v1_routes.GET /api/god-mode/status/{project_id}: Returns project_id, god_mode_complete (false), god_mode_phase (1), files_saved (27), file_paths array

agent_memory_routes.GET /api/memory: Returns memories array filtered by project_id and limit

build_memory_routes.GET /api/memory/stats: Returns total_builds, successful_builds, success_rate, total_insights, by_project_type
